programs.title: Hart's War
programs.desc: Bruce Willis stars as an imprisoned officer who refuses to give up his fight against the Nazis, even from behind enemy lines. With the help of a young lieutenant (Colin Farrell), he risks everything to free his men and change the outcome of the war!

programs.title: The Great Escape
programs.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an "inescapable" Nazi POW camp.

programs.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programs.desc: Sophisticated, handsome Thomas Crown (Steve McQueen) is the intellect behind a bank robbery so stunning, it has Boston's finest completely baffled.  Faye Dunaway is the sleek and smart insurance investigator out to bring him in.

programs.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1999)
programs.desc: In this sizzling action film, when thrill-seeking billionaire Thomas Crown (Pierce Brosnan) ingeniously steals a priceless painting from a museum, he's pitted against the beautiful insurance investigator (Rene Russo) hired to retrieve the artwork.

programs.title: The Man In The Iron Mask
programs.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!

programs.title: King Solomon's Mines (1985)
programs.desc: Experience wild stunts, romance and heart-pounding excitement with Richard Chamberlain as a soldier of fortune who unwittingly gets tied into a young woman's (Sharon Stone) search for her missing father. Herbert Lom and John Rhys-Davies also star.
